modules.module_title: Introduction to Nursery and its Importance
Vegetative Propagation - II (Grafting, Budding, Specialized Structures)

questions.question: Nursery ki primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Healthy young plants produce karna

questions.explanation: Nursery ka mukhya uddeshya swasth aur mazboot chote paudhe taiyar karna hai, jinhe baad mein khet ya garden mein transplant kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Ek ideal nursery ke liye kaun si jagah best hai?

options.B: Water source ke paas aur well-drained soil

questions.explanation: Paani ki upalabdhta aur acchi water drainage wali mitti nursery ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein use hone wala ek basic tool kaun sa hai?

options.B: Trowel (khurpi)

questions.explanation: Khurpi (trowel) mitti khodne aur chote paudhon ko lagane ke liye nursery mein istemal hone wala ek aam tool hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein plants ko kyon grow karte hain?

options.B: Large scale par propagation aur protection ke liye

questions.explanation: Nursery mein plants ko bade paimane par ugate aur unki suraksha karte hain jab tak ve field mein lagane ke liye taiyar na ho jayein.

questions.question: Shade net ka use nursery mein kya hai?

options.A: Plants ko garam rakhne ke liye
options.B: Plants ko zyada dhoop se bachane ke liye
options.C: Plants ko support dene ke liye
options.D: Weeds ko control karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Shade net plants ko tez dhoop aur garmi se bachata hai, khaaskar young seedlings ke liye.

questions.question: Potted plants ko rakhte samay kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Unhe ek doosre se chipka kar rakhein
options.B: Proper spacing rakhein taaki air circulation acchi ho
options.C: Unhe bina pani diye chhod dein

questions.explanation: Proper spacing se hawa ka sanchalan accha hota hai, jo bimariyon se bachata hai aur har paudhe ko paryapt roshni milti hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein "hardening off" ka matlab kya hai?

options.B: Plants ko gradually outdoor conditions ke liye taiyar karna
options.D: Plants ko ek hi jagah par rakhna

questions.explanation: Hardening off ek process hai jismein plants ko dheere-dheere tough outdoor conditions ke liye adjust kiya jaata hai, taaki ve transplant shock se bach sakein.

questions.question: Container nursery aur bare-root nursery mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Container nursery mein plants soil mein hote hain, bare-root mein paani mein.
options.B: Container nursery mein plants pots mein hote hain, bare-root mein roots par koi mitti nahi hoti.
options.C: Container nursery sirf flowers ke liye hai, bare-root sirf vegetables ke liye.
options.D: Container nursery mein plants bade hote hain, bare-root mein chote.

questions.explanation: Container nursery mein paudhe pots ya bags mein ugate hain, jabki bare-root nursery mein paudhon ko mitti hatakar transfer kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein site selection ke time kya factors consider karne chahiye?

options.B: Water availability, soil type, sunlight exposure, market proximity

questions.explanation: Paani ki upalabdhta, mitti ka prakar, suraj ki roshni, aur market tak pahunch jaise kai factors ko dhyaan mein rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Nursery layout design karte samay kis efficiency factor ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Labour movement, water management, and plant handling efficiency

questions.explanation: Ek accha layout shramik ki aawajahi, paani ka prabandhan, aur paudhon ko handle karne mein efficiency badhata hai.

questions.question: Ek commercial nursery ke liye market accessibility kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf suppliers ko khush karne ke liye
options.B: Fresh plants ko jaldi customers tak pahunchane ke liye
options.C: Plants ko zyada der tak store karne ke liye
options.D: Labour cost kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Market tak aasaan pahunch se plants ko jaldi aur fresh condition mein customers tak pahunchaya ja sakta hai, jisse nuksan kam hota hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein water source ka convenient hona kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf plants ko nahlane ke liye
options.B: Regular aur sufficient irrigation ke liye
options.C: Nursery ko saaf rakhne ke liye
options.D: Workers ko peene ka paani dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Plants ko niyamit aur paryapt paani ki zaroorat hoti hai, isliye paani ka convenient source hona bahut mahatvapurna hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein labelling ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Sirf plants ko sundar dikhane ke liye
options.B: Plants ki identification, variety, aur age track karne ke liye
options.C: Weeds ko control karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Labelling se har paudhe ki sahi pehchan, kism, aur umra ka pata chalta hai, jo management aur sales ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Polythene bags ka use nursery mein kis liye hota hai?

options.A: Sirf mitti ko store karne ke liye
options.B: Plants ko grow karne aur transport karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Polythene bags lightweight aur affordable hote hain, jinmein plants ko ugana aur ek jagah se doosri jagah le jaana aasaan hota hai.

questions.question: Modern nursery management mein technology ka kya role hai?

options.A: Sirf social media marketing ke liye
options.B: Automated irrigation, climate control, and data management for efficiency
options.C: Plants ko zyada mahanga banane ke liye
options.D: Manual labour ko badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Modern technology jaise automated irrigation, climate control, aur data management nursery operations ko zyada efficient aur productive banate hain.

questions.question: Sustainable nursery practices mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Organic fertilizers, water conservation, and pest management ka use karna

questions.explanation: Sustainable practices mein paryavaran-friendly tarike shamil hote hain jaise organic khaad, paani bachana, aur eco-friendly tarike se keeton ka niyantran.

questions.question: Ek successful commercial nursery chalane ke liye business skills kyon important hain?

options.A: Sirf plants ki dekhbhal ke liye
options.B: Marketing, inventory management, and financial planning ke liye
options.C: Sirf plants ko pani dene ke liye
options.D: Plants ko sundar banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Business skills jaise marketing, inventory management, aur financial planning ek commercial nursery ko profitable aur sustainable banane ke liye essential hain.

questions.question: Plants ki growth ke liye sabse important soil component kaun sa hai?

options.B: Air

questions.explanation: Organic matter mitti ki fertility, water retention, aur structure ko improve karta hai, jo plants ki growth ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Potting mix banate samay mitti ko kyon sterilize karte hain?

options.A: Plants ko zyada badhane ke liye
options.B: Weeds, pests, aur pathogens ko eliminate karne ke liye
options.C: Matti ko soft banane ke liye
options.D: Matti ko rang dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Soil sterilization se harmful weeds, insects, aur bimari failane wale microorganisms khatam ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Cocopeat ka use potting mix mein kis liye hota hai?

options.B: Water retention aur aeration improve karne ke liye
options.C: Plants ko khana dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Cocopeat paani ko acchi tarah se hold karta hai aur mitti mein hawa ka sanchalan banaye rakhta hai.

questions.question: Vermiculite potting mix mein kya role play karta hai?

options.B: Water aur nutrient holding capacity badhana

questions.explanation: Vermiculite lightweight hota hai aur paani aur nutrients ko absorb karke dheere-dheere release karta hai.

questions.question: Acchi drainage ke liye potting mix mein kya add karna chahiye?

options.B: Sand ya Perlite

questions.explanation: Sand aur Perlite mitti mein drainage ko improve karte hain, jisse roots ko oxygen milta hai aur waterlogging nahi hoti.

questions.question: Raised beds banane ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Better drainage aur soil warming

questions.explanation: Raised beds mein drainage accha hota hai aur mitti jaldi garam hoti hai, jo plants ki growth ke liye faydemand hai.

questions.question: Garden soil ko directly potting mix mein use karna kyon avoid karna chahiye?

options.A: Garden soil bahut halki hoti hai
options.B: Garden soil mein pests, diseases, aur weeds ho sakte hain, aur drainage poor ho sakti hai
options.C: Garden soil bahut mehengi hoti hai
options.D: Garden soil mein koi nutrients nahi hote

questions.explanation: Garden soil mein harmful organisms aur poor drainage ki problem ho sakti hai, isliye use seed starting ya potting ke liye avoid karte hain.

questions.question: Soil pH test kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf mitti ka rang dekhne ke liye
options.B: Plants ke liye available nutrients determine karne ke liye
options.C: Matti ki weight check karne ke liye
options.D: Matti ki smell check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Soil pH plants ke liye nutrients ki availability ko affect karta hai, isliye sahi pH level maintain karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ideal potting mix mein kis ratio mein components hone chahiye (general)?

options.B: Equal parts soil, sand, aur organic matter

questions.explanation: Ek general ideal potting mix mein acchi aeration, drainage, aur nutrient retention ke liye mitti, sand, aur organic matter ka santulit anupat hota hai.

questions.question: Chemical soil sterilization ka ek common method kya hai?

options.B: Heating in an oven

questions.explanation: Formaldehyde solution ek chemical sterilant hai jo mitti mein pathogens ko control karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Compost ka potting mix mein kya fayda hai?

options.B: Natural nutrients provide karna aur soil structure improve karna

questions.explanation: Compost ek organic fertilizer hai jo mitti ko nutrients deta hai aur uski physical properties ko sudharta hai.

questions.question: Ek acchi potting mix ki kya characteristics honi chahiye?

options.B: Good drainage, aeration, water retention, aur nutrient holding capacity

questions.explanation: Acchi potting mix mein paani nikalne ki acchi kshamta, hawa ka sanchalan, paani rokne ki kshamta, aur poshak tatva dharan karne ki kshamta honi chahiye.

questions.question: Sandy soil ko improve karne ke liye kya add karna chahiye?

options.B: Organic matter jaise compost ya cocopeat

questions.explanation: Organic matter sandy soil ki water retention capacity aur nutrient holding capacity ko badhata hai.

questions.question: Clayey soil ko improve karne ke liye kya add karna chahiye?

options.B: Organic matter aur sand

questions.explanation: Organic matter aur sand clayey soil ki drainage aur aeration ko improve karte hain, uski density ko kam karte hain.

questions.question: Hydroponics mein plants grow karne ke liye kaun sa medium use hota hai?

options.B: Sirf paani
options.C: Inert media jaise rockwool, coco coir, perlite

questions.explanation: Hydroponics mein plants ko mitti ke bina, inert media mein ugate hain aur nutrients ko paani mein dissolve karke dete hain.

questions.question: Potting mix mein pH buffer ka kya role hai?

options.B: pH levels ko stable rakhna

questions.explanation: pH buffer potting mix ke pH levels ko fluctuations se bachata hai, jisse plants ko stable environment milta hai.

questions.question: Biochar ka potting mix mein kya fayda hai?

options.B: Soil fertility, water retention, aur microbial activity enhance karna

questions.explanation: Biochar ek porous carbon material hai jo mitti ki urvarakta, paani rokne ki kshamta, aur microbial activity ko badhata hai.

questions.question: Seed propagation ka sabse basic tarika kya hai?

options.B: Layering karna

questions.explanation: Seed propagation mein seeds ko bo kar naye plants ugate hain.

questions.question: Seed sowing ke liye kis type ki mitti achhi hoti hai?

options.B: Well-drained, light, aur fine potting mix

questions.explanation: Seeds ko germinating ke liye halki, acchi drainage wali, aur fine particle size wali mitti chahiye hoti hai.

questions.question: Seed treatment kyon kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Sirf seeds ko sundar banane ke liye
options.B: Germination rate improve karne aur diseases se bachane ke liye
options.C: Seeds ko zyada der tak store karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Seed treatment se seeds ka ankurit hone ka rate badhta hai aur unhe shuruaati stage mein bimariyon se bachaya jaata hai.

questions.question: "Broadcasting" method kya hai?

options.B: Seeds ko wide area mein scatter karna

questions.explanation: Broadcasting mein seeds ko bade area mein uniformly bikher dete hain.

questions.question: Seedlings ko "pricking out" kyon karte hain?

options.A: Sirf unko disturb karne ke liye
options.B: Overcrowding kam karne aur har seedling ko space dene ke liye
options.C: Unko zyada paani dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Pricking out se crowded seedlings ko separate karke unhe zyada space aur nutrients milte hain, jisse unki acchi growth hoti hai.

questions.question: Seed viability test ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Seed ke colour ko dekhna
options.C: Seed ke germinating power ko check karna
options.D: Seed ke weight ko check karna

questions.explanation: Seed viability test se pata chalta hai ki kitne seeds ankurit ho sakte hain, jisse sowing se pehle unki quality pata chalti hai.

questions.question: Small seeds ko sow karte samay kya dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Unhe mitti ki upari surface par halka cover karna chahiye
options.C: Unhe bina paani ke chhod dena chahiye
options.D: Unhe tez dhoop mein rakhna chahiye

questions.explanation: Chote seeds ko bahut gehra bone se ve germinating nahi kar pate, isliye unhe halki mitti se cover karna chahiye.

questions.question: Scarification method ka use kis liye hota hai?

options.A: Seeds ko thanda karne ke liye
options.B: Hard seed coat ko break karne ke liye
options.C: Seeds ko zyada paani dene ke liye
options.D: Seeds ko colour dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Scarification seeds ke hard outer coat ko physically ya chemically break karta hai, jisse paani absorb ho sake aur germination ho.

questions.question: Stratification method kis liye use hota hai?

options.A: Seeds ko garam karne ke liye
options.B: Seeds ko cold treatment dene ke liye dormancy break karne ke liye
options.C: Seeds ko tez dhoop mein rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Stratification seeds ko thande aur nam conditions mein rakh kar unki dormancy ko todta hai, jo kai temperate plants ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: "Dibbling" method of sowing kya hai?

options.B: Seeds ko lines mein dalna
options.C: Seeds ko small holes mein individualy lagana

questions.explanation: Dibbling mein seeds ko chhote-chhote holes mein ek-ek karke lagaya jaata hai, jisse uniform spacing milti hai.

questions.question: Seedling damping-off disease ka main reason kya hai?

options.B: Fungal infection due to high humidity aur poor air circulation

questions.explanation: Damping-off ek fungal disease hai jo high humidity aur poor air circulation ke karan hota hai, jisse young seedlings mar jaate hain.

questions.question: Seedlings ko transplant karne ka best time kaun sa hai?

options.B: Jab unki 2-3 true leaves aa jayein
options.D: Jab ve bahut bade ho jayein

questions.explanation: Jab seedlings mein 2-3 true leaves aa jaati hain, tab ve transplant shock ko jhelne ke liye zyada mazboot hote hain.

questions.question: Seed storage ke liye ideal conditions kya hain?

options.B: Cool, dry, aur dark

questions.explanation: Seeds ko cool, dry, aur dark conditions mein store karne se unki viability lambe samay tak bani rehti hai.

questions.question: Seed dormancy ke kya fayde hain?

options.B: Unfavorable conditions mein germination ko prevent karna

questions.explanation: Seed dormancy seeds ko unfavorable conditions mein germinating se rokti hai, jisse unhe survive karne ka mauka milta hai jab conditions better ho.

questions.question: Tetrazolium (TZ) test kis liye use hota hai?

options.A: Seed ke weight ko check karne ke liye
options.B: Seed viability ko rapidly determine karne ke liye
options.C: Seed ke size ko check karne ke liye
options.D: Seed ke colour ko check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: TZ test seeds ke living tissues ko stain karta hai, jisse unki metabolic activity aur viability ka pata chalta hai, bina germination ka wait kiye.

questions.question: Priming method ka seed propagation mein kya role hai?

options.B: Germination process ko speed up karne aur uniformity badhane ke liye
options.D: Seeds ko zyada der tak store karna

questions.explanation: Seed priming mein seeds ko controlled hydration ke through partially hydrate kiya jaata hai, jisse germination faster aur uniform hoti hai.

questions.question: Hybrid seeds ke kya fayde hain?

options.B: Better yield, disease resistance, aur uniform growth

questions.explanation: Hybrid seeds do genetically different parents ko cross karke banaye jaate hain, jisse unme superior characteristics (heterosis) aati hain jaise zyada upaj, bimariyon se ladne ki kshamta, aur uniform growth.

questions.question: Vegetative propagation mein plants kaise produce hote hain?

options.B: Plant ke vegetative parts (stem, leaf, root) se

questions.explanation: Vegetative propagation mein naye plants plant ke non-sexual parts jaise stem, leaf, ya root se banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Cutting propagation ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: New plants genetically identical hote hain parent plant ke

questions.explanation: Cuttings se bane plants apne parent plant ke exact genetic copy hote hain.

questions.question: Stem cuttings ke liye kaun sa part use hota hai?

options.B: Sirf root

questions.explanation: Stem cuttings mein parent plant ke stem ka ek tukda kaat kar root develop ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Rooting hormone ka use cuttings mein kyon karte hain?

options.A: Sirf cuttings ko colour dene ke liye
options.B: Root development ko stimulate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Rooting hormones (jaise auxins) cuttings mein jadon ke vikas ko badhava dete hain.

questions.question: Layering mein naya plant kaise banta hai?

options.B: Parent plant se attached rehte hue roots develop karke

questions.explanation: Layering mein stem ka ek part parent plant se attached rehta hai aur mitti mein ya kisi medium mein roots develop karta hai.

questions.question: Simple layering ke liye kis type ki branch best hoti hai?

options.B: Flexible, low-hanging branch

questions.explanation: Simple layering ke liye aisi branch chahiye jo zameen tak bend ho sake.

questions.question: Air layering mein roots kahan develop hoti hain?

options.B: Hawa mein, stem par ek cut lagakar aur moist medium se cover karke

questions.explanation: Air layering mein stem ke ek portion par cut lagakar use moist medium (jaise sphagnum moss) se cover karke roots develop ki jaati hain.

questions.question: Hardwood cuttings kis season mein li jaati hain?

options.B: Dormant season (late autumn/winter)

questions.explanation: Hardwood cuttings un plants se li jaati hain jo dormant stage mein hote hain, unme rooting rate accha hota hai.

questions.question: Softwood cuttings aur semi-hardwood cuttings mein kya antar hai?

options.A: Softwood zyada purani hoti hai, semi-hardwood nayi.
options.B: Softwood nayi, pliable growth hoti hai, semi-hardwood thodi mature.
options.C: Softwood sirf flowers ke liye, semi-hardwood sirf fruits ke liye.
options.D: Softwood mein roots nahi aati, semi-hardwood mein aati hain.

questions.explanation: Softwood cuttings spring mein li gayi nayi growth hoti hain, jabki semi-hardwood cuttings summer mein li gayi thodi mature growth hoti hain.

questions.question: Leaf cuttings ke liye kaun se plants suitable hain?

options.B: Plants like African Violets, Begonias, Sansevieria

questions.explanation: African Violets, Begonias, aur Sansevieria jaise plants leaf cuttings se aasaani se propagate ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Layering ke liye "girdling" ya "wounding" kyon karte hain?

options.A: Sirf stem ko kamzor karne ke liye
options.B: Roots ko stimulate karne ke liye by interrupting downward nutrient flow
options.C: Plants ko zyada paani dene ke liye
options.D: Plants ko colour dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Girdling ya wounding se phloem tissues ko cut kiya jaata hai, jisse carbohydrates aur auxins cut ke upar jama hote hain, aur roots formation stimulate hota hai.

questions.question: Serpentine layering ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Ek hi branch se kai naye plants produce karna

questions.explanation: Serpentine layering mein ek lambi flexible branch ko kai jagahon par mitti mein dabaya jaata hai, jisse har dabaye hue point par roots develop hoti hain aur kai plants bante hain.

questions.question: Root cuttings ke liye kaun se plants best hote hain?

options.B: Plants like raspberry, sumac, sweet potato

questions.explanation: Raspberry, sumac, aur sweet potato jaise plants ki root cuttings se aasaani se naye plants banaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Mist propagation system ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Cuttings ko high humidity provide karna aur water loss kam karna

questions.explanation: Mist propagation system cuttings ke upar fine mist spray karta hai, jo unhe wilting se bachata hai aur rooting ko promote karta hai.

questions.question: Etiolation ka vegetative propagation mein kya role hai?

options.B: Stem ko light se block karke rooting ko stimulate karna

questions.explanation: Etiolation (light se block karna) stem mein auxins ko accumulate karta hai aur rooting potential ko badhata hai, jisse layering aur cutting mein fayda hota hai.

questions.question: Adventitious roots aur adventitious shoots mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Adventitious roots stem ya leaf se banti hain, adventitious shoots root se banti hain.
options.C: Adventitious roots plant ke normal root system ka part hain.

questions.explanation: Adventitious roots un jagahon se develop hoti hain jahan normally roots nahi hoti (jaise stem ya leaf se), jabki adventitious shoots roots ya stems se develop hoti hain jahan normally shoots nahi hote.

questions.question: Auxin ke alawa, kaun sa plant hormone rooting ko affect karta hai?

options.B: Cytokinins (indirectly, by balancing with auxins)

questions.explanation: While auxins directly promote rooting, cytokinins ke saath unka balance bhi root development mein mahatvapurna role play karta hai. High auxin to cytokinin ratio generally favors rooting.

questions.question: Grafting mein kya hota hai?

options.A: Seeds ko bo kar naye plants banana
options.B: Do plants ke parts ko join karna taaki ve ek plant ki tarah grow karein

questions.explanation: Grafting mein ek plant (scion) ke shoot ko doosre plant (rootstock) ke root system par join kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Scion kya hota hai grafting mein?

options.B: Upper part (shoot) jo fruit ya flower produce karega

questions.explanation: Scion woh upper part hota hai jo desired characteristics (fruit, flower) provide karta hai.

questions.question: Rootstock kya hota hai grafting mein?

options.B: Lower part (root system) jo soil se nutrients absorb karega

questions.explanation: Rootstock woh lower part hota hai jo root system provide karta hai aur mitti se paani aur nutrients absorb karta hai.

questions.question: Budding aur grafting mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Budding mein pura scion use hota hai, grafting mein sirf ek bud.
options.B: Budding mein sirf ek bud use hota hai, grafting mein pura scion.
options.D: Budding sirf trees ke liye hai, grafting sirf shrubs ke liye.

questions.explanation: Budding ek type ki grafting hai jismein scion ke roop mein sirf ek single bud use hota hai, jabki grafting mein ek poora shoot (scion) use hota hai.

questions.question: Bulbs se propagate hone wala ek plant ka naam batao?

options.B: Onion (Pyaaz)

questions.explanation: Pyaaz, lehsun, aur lily jaise plants bulbs se propagate hote hain.

questions.question: Tubers se propagate hone wala ek plant ka naam batao?

options.B: Potato (Aaloo)

questions.explanation: Aaloo (potato) tubers se propagate hota hai, jismein 'eyes' se naye shoots nikalte hain.

questions.question: Graft union successful hone ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Scion aur rootstock ke cambium layers ka acchi tarah align hona

questions.explanation: Cambium layers ka proper alignment zaroori hai taaki vascular connection ban sake aur nutrients aur paani ka flow ho sake.

questions.question: T-budding kis season mein ki jaati hai?

options.B: Active growing season (late spring to early autumn)

questions.explanation: T-budding tab ki jaati hai jab rootstock active growth mein ho, jisse uski bark aasaani se lift ho sake aur bud acchi tarah se fuse ho sake.

questions.question: Cleft grafting kyon ki jaati hai?

options.B: Jab rootstock scion se significantly mota ho

questions.explanation: Cleft grafting tab use hoti hai jab rootstock ka diameter scion se kaafi zyada ho, jisse multiple scions fit ho sakein.

questions.question: Rhizomes se propagate hone wala ek plant ka naam batao?

options.B: Ginger (Adrak)

questions.explanation: Adrak (ginger), haldi, aur bans (bamboo) jaise plants rhizomes se propagate hote hain, jo underground stems hote hain.

questions.question: Corms aur bulbs mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Corms fleshy leaves hote hain, bulbs solid stem.
options.B: Corms solid, swollen stem hote hain, bulbs fleshy, scale-like leaves.
options.D: Corms sirf flowers ke liye hain, bulbs sirf vegetables ke liye.

questions.explanation: Corm ek solid, bhara hua underground stem hota hai (jaise Gladiolus), jabki bulb fleshy scale-like leaves se bana hota hai (jaise Pyaaz).

questions.question: Micropropagation (tissue culture) ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Large number of genetically identical, disease-free plants ko rapidly produce karna

questions.explanation: Micropropagation se bahut kam samay mein bade paimane par genetically uniform aur disease-free plants taiyar kiye जा sakte hain.

questions.question: Interstock grafting ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Scion aur rootstock ke beech incompatibility ko overcome karna ya specific effects (dwarfing) dena

questions.explanation: Interstock (ya interstem) ek intermediate piece hota hai jo scion aur rootstock ke beech incompatibility hone par ya dwarfing ya disease resistance jaise specific traits provide karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Bench grafting kis liye suitable hai?

options.A: Sirf field mein bade trees ke liye
options.B: Large scale propagation of young, dormant plants in a controlled environment

questions.explanation: Bench grafting nursery mein controlled environment mein ki jaati hai, khaaskar dormant season mein, aur isse bade paimane par grafting possible ho paati hai.

questions.question: Apomixis se propagate hone wale plants ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Seeds produce karna jo genetically identical hote hain parent plant ke

questions.explanation: Apomixis asexual reproduction ka ek prakar hai jismein seeds bina fertilization ke bante hain, jisse naye plants genetically parent ke jaise hote hain.

questions.question: Specialized structures (bulbs, corms, tubers, rhizomes) se propagation ko "offsets" ya "daughter plants" kyon kehte hain?

options.A: Kyunki ve seeds se bante hain
options.B: Kyunki ve genetically identical hote hain parent plant ke
options.C: Kyunki ve bahut chote hote hain
options.D: Kyunki ve alag-alag colour ke hote hain

questions.explanation: Ye structures parent plant ke vegetative growth se bante hain aur genetically unke jaise hi hote hain, isliye unhe offsets ya daughter plants kehte hain.

questions.question: Nursery mein regular watering kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf mitti ko geela rakhne ke liye
options.B: Plants ki growth aur survival ke liye
options.C: Sirf weeds ko badhane ke liye
options.D: Plants ko thanda rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Plants ko regular aur paryapt paani ki zaroorat hoti hai unki growth aur jeevan ke liye.

questions.question: Weeds ko nursery se kyon hatana chahiye?

options.A: Sirf nursery ko sundar dikhane ke liye
options.B: Plants ke nutrients, paani, aur roshni ke liye compete karte hain
options.D: Weeds mitti ko accha banate hain

questions.explanation: Weeds desired plants ke liye zaruri resources (nutrients, water, light) ke liye compete karte hain, unki growth ko kam karte hain.

questions.question: Ek common nursery pest ka naam batao?

options.B: Aphids (Mahoon)

questions.explanation: Aphids (Mahoon) chote insects hote hain jo plants ke ras ko choos kar unhe nuksan pahunchate hain, nursery mein aam hain.

questions.question: Fungicides ka use kis liye hota hai?

options.A: Sirf insects ko marne ke liye
options.B: Fungal diseases ko control karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf weeds ko marne ke liye
options.D: Plants ko khana dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Fungicides chemical substances hote hain jo fungal infections aur diseases ko rokne ya unka ilaj karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) ka use nursery mein kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Chemicals, sharp tools, aur dust se bachne ke liye
options.C: Plants ko khana dene ke liye
options.D: Sirf garmi se bachne ke liye

questions.explanation: PPE jaise gloves, masks, aur safety glasses workers ko chemicals, sharp tools, aur dust se hone wale khatron se bachate hain.

questions.question: Nutrient deficiency ke kya symptoms ho sakte hain?

options.A: Sirf plants ka zyada bada hona
options.B: Yellowing leaves (chlorosis), stunted growth, ya abnormal leaf shape

questions.explanation: Nutrient deficiency ke karan plants mein peeli pattiyaan (chlorosis), growth ka rukna, ya patti ki aakriti mein badlav jaise lakshan dikhte hain.

questions.question: Drip irrigation system ka nursery mein kya fayda hai?

options.B: Water efficiency badhana aur plants ko directly roots par paani dena

questions.explanation: Drip irrigation paani ko seedhe plants ki roots tak pahunchata hai, jisse paani ki bachat hoti hai aur evaporation loss kam hota hai.

questions.question: Integrated Pest Management (IPM) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Biological, cultural, aur chemical methods ka combination use karke pests ko control karna

questions.explanation: IPM ek holistic approach hai jismein pests ko control karne ke liye kai tarikon ka samavesh hota hai, jisse paryavaran par kam se kam asar pade.

questions.question: Nursery mein record keeping kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf papers collect karne ke liye
options.B: Plant inventory, sales, expenses, aur propagation details track karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf plants ke naam yaad rakhne ke liye
options.D: Sirf plants ko paani dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Record keeping se nursery ke operations ko effectively manage kiya ja sakta hai, jismein stock, bikri, kharch, aur propagation ki jaankari shamil hoti hai.

questions.question: Biological pest control ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Ladybugs ka use karna aphids ko khane ke liye

questions.explanation: Biological control mein natural enemies (jaise ladybugs) ka use karke pests ki population ko control kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Fungus gnats (machhar) ko control karne ka ek tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Overwatering avoid karna aur sticky traps use karna

questions.explanation: Fungus gnats aksar overwatered mitti mein breed karte hain, isliye overwatering avoid karna aur sticky traps ka use karna effective hota hai.

questions.question: Soil-borne diseases ko control karne ke liye kya kar sakte hain?

options.B: Soil sterilization, crop rotation, aur resistant varieties use karna

questions.explanation: Soil-borne diseases ko control karne ke liye mitti ka sterilization, fasal chakra apnana, aur bimari pratirodhak kismon ka upyog karna faydemand hota hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein plant nutrition management ke liye Fertigation ka kya role hai?

options.B: Fertilizers ko irrigation water ke saath apply karna for efficient nutrient delivery

questions.explanation: Fertigation mein fertilizers ko paani ke saath mix karke plants ko diya jaata hai, jisse nutrients seedhe roots tak pahunchte hain aur wastage kam hota hai.

questions.question: IPM mein cultural control measures ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Cleanliness maintain karna, proper spacing, aur healthy plant selection

questions.explanation: Cultural control mein aisi practices shamil hoti hain jo plants ko healthy rakhti hain aur pests/diseases ke liye unfavorable conditions banati hain, jaise safai, sahi spacing, aur healthy plants ka chayan.

questions.question: Biological control mein "predators" aur "parasitoids" mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Predators kai pests ko khate hain, Parasitoids ek pest par egg dete hain aur usse marte hain
options.C: Predators sirf plants ko khate hain
options.D: Parasitoids sirf weeds ko khate hain

questions.explanation: Predators kai saare pests ko khaate hain (jaise ladybugs), jabki parasitoids ek host pest par apne ande dete hain, aur unke larvae host ko consume karke mar dete hain.

questions.question: Nursery mein marketing aur sales strategy kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf plants ko store karne ke liye
options.B: Products ko effectively customers tak pahunchane aur profit maximize karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf plants ko pani dene ke liye
options.D: Sirf weeds ko control karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Ek acchi marketing aur sales strategy nursery ke products ko sahi customers tak pahunchati hai, brand visibility badhati hai, aur business ko profitable banati hai.
